title: Bridge Essay: Reflexivity gradient-Consciousness knowing itself.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Nondual/Unity** (Phase 16) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Nondual/Unity to mechanistic neuroscience through Reflexivity, gradient-Consciousness, knowing, itself..

**Reflexivity gradient-Consciousness knowing itself.** — Front Psychol. PMID: 39246319. DOI: 10.3389/fpsyg.2024.1450553. Some consider phenomenal consciousness to be the great achievement of the evolution of life on earth, but the real achievement is much more than mere phenomenality. The real achievement is that consciousness has woken up within us and has recognized itself, that within us humans, consciousness knows that it is conscious. This short review explores the reflexivity of consciousness from the perspective of consciousness itself-anon-conceptual nondual awareness, whose main property is its non-repre
